buildCommand: cd packages/astro-web && npm run build && mkdir -p ../../.vercel && cp -r .vercel/output ../../.vercel/output

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.clarity.ms; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.rhumb.dev https://www.google-analytics.com https://www.clarity.ms; frame-ancestors 'none'
